examples: Because all of you say that I cast out devils through Beelzebub.
And if I by Beelzebub cast out devils, by whom do your sons cast them out?
And if I by Beelzebub cast out devils, by whom do your children cast them out?
Political foes in Italy dubbed him Beelzebub and his cynical quips became the stuff of legend in Italy.
Herman Cain is not some political Beelzebub in this election-year Passion play.
